content:
🔥 Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Building, optimizing, and debugging AI agent systems that require advanced context management and effective information curation within limited context windows.
✨ Key Features: • Context Fundamentals • Context Degradation Patterns • Context Compression Strategies
📖 Summary: This repository provides a comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, focusing on optimizing how information is managed within an AI model's context window. It aims to enhance the effectiveness of production-grade AI agent systems by teaching principles of curating system prompts, tool definitions, message history, and tool outputs.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
